Goal machine vs. Goal artist. Who truly ruled the Premier League?

Shearer's record is untouchable, but for sheer fear factor and all-around game-changing brilliance, was peak Henry simply different gravy? The debate RAGES.

Before the Ballon d'Or became a two-man show, one African legend SHOCKED the world!

George Weah in '95. A true phenomenon. Pace, power, skill, THAT solo goal for Milan! He carried teams, destroyed defences, and became the ONLY African to win the Ballon d'Or. A pioneer, a GOAT. His highlight reel still breaks the internet. #KingGeorge #MilanLegend
